Identity.Name: Pset_StingProjectOrg
Identity.Definition: Project-organization metadata for ISO 19650-2 information delivery. Carries the 13 PRJ_ORG_* fields used by STING's Template Engine v1.1 — appointing-party / lead-appointed-party / originator / phase / class / workflow profile + delivery options. Attached to IfcProject; one Pset per project. Token-substituted into every generated deliverable via DocumentIdentityGenerator and surfaced in title blocks via TitleBlockParamApplier.

Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 19650-2:2018 §5.1 appointing-party / lead-appointed-party roles; BS EN ISO 19650-1:2018 §5.6 project information requirements; STING Template Engine v1.1 (Phase 112)

Property.name: ProjectCode
Property.Definition: ISO 19650-2 project code — short alphanumeric identifier used as the {prj} token in document-number patterns. Typically 3-6 characters. Example: "RVH" for Riverside Hospital.

Property.name: OriginatorCode
Property.Definition: ISO 19650-2 originator code — short identifier for the appointed-party producing the information. Used as {org} token in document patterns. Typically 3-5 characters. Example: "PLNS" for Planscape.

Property.name: CompanyName
Property.Definition: Full legal name of the originator company. Printed on title blocks + transmittals + deliverables.

Property.name: CompanyAddress
Property.Definition: Originator company address. Multi-line text; included in transmittal headers and deliverable cover sheets.

Property.name: ClientName
Property.Definition: Full name of the appointing party / client. ISO 19650-2 terminology: "the party for whom an information container is produced".

Property.name: AppointingParty
Property.Definition: ISO 19650-2 appointing-party reference — typically the client + their representative. Distinct from ClientName when the client appoints a project manager who acts on their behalf.

Property.name: LeadAppointedParty
Property.Definition: ISO 19650-2 lead-appointed-party — the discipline lead coordinating delivery. Often the architect on a building project. Recorded for BEP appendices and transmittal routing.

Property.name: Participants
Property.Definition: Free-text list of project participants (firms, individuals, suppliers). Drives distribution-group default for transmittals.

Property.name: Phase
Property.Definition: RIBA Plan of Work 2020 stage code. References StingRibaStages. Drives stage-aware IDS overlay selection + workflow-conditional steps.

Property.name: Class
Property.Definition: ISO 19650-1 information class. UK Annex Table 5 values: 0 (initial WIP), 1 (suitable for coordination), 2 (suitable for information), etc. Free-text in this property; the broader Suitability codes are recorded per-deliverable in document register.

Property.name: WorkflowProfile
Property.Definition: Named workflow profile (default | acute-healthcare | mental-health | industrial | etc.) — selects the active subset of Phase 184c+ workflow JSON files. Drives which DailyQA / ProjectKickoff / IssueDeliverable preset variants apply.

Property.name: SignatureProvider
Property.Definition: Identity of the digital-signature provider for published documents (DocuSign / Adobe Sign / internal). v1.2 deliverable per the Template Engine runner; field exists from v1.1 for forward-compatibility.

Property.name: AiExtractEnabled
Property.Definition: Whether AI-driven metadata extraction is enabled for this project's document-register entries. v1.2 deliverable; field exists from v1.1 for forward-compatibility.

Rule.Description: ProjectCode must be non-empty and match the pattern used by the document-number token substitution (typically 3-6 uppercase alphanumerics).
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Set the project code via ProjectSetupWizard or directly on the IfcProject Pset.

Rule.Description: Phase must be a member of StingRibaStages. Drives stage-aware IDS overlay selection — invalid value disables stage-gated validation.
Rule.FailMessage: Pset_StingProjectOrg.Phase is not a valid RIBA stage.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Set Phase to one of: Stage_0, Stage_1, Stage_2, Stage_3, Stage_4, Stage_5, Stage_6, Stage_7.

Rule.Description: Exactly one Pset_StingProjectOrg per project. Multiple instances are a host-plugin bug. BEHAVIOURAL ASSERTION: enforced by every STING tag-write path (Revit's ProjectSetupCommand, Bonsai add-on's on-load handler).
Rule.FailMessage: More than one Pset_StingProjectOrg attached to the project.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Remove duplicates; keep the most recent (highest ModifiedAt timestamp).
